modmenu.summaryTranslation.seamlesssleep: Never blink through the night again.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.seamlesss:
Rethinks the way players sleep:

§8-§r Smooth & Synced animation
§8-§r Visual improvements
§8-§r Minimal server impact

Now available for: §3§lForge§r, §6§lNeoForge§r and §f§lFabric§r!
Discord: gabrielfl4
config.seamlesssleep.title: Seamless Sleep Settings
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_text_opa: Adjusts text transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_backgrou: Adjusts the dark background transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.enabled.des: Shows the sleep transition message during the transition.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.darkness.de: Controls how dark the screen gets (fade out) when closing eyes.
config.seamlesssleep.chat.dim_multiplier: General chat opacity when lying in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.chat.max_lines.desc:
Maximum chat lines visible while sleeping.

Use 0 to hide.
config.seamlesssleep.camera.tilt_degrees:
Camera tilt angle when lying down.

Accepted range: 0 to 90.
0 is treated as 0.1 internally.
config.seamlesssleep.misc.debug_logs.des: Shows Seamless Sleep technical logs in the console.
config.seamlesssleep.misc.replay_compati: Changes the mod base math to an §eexperimental§r one compatible with mods like ReplayMod and Flashback.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.clears_weathe:
Chance to clear rain and thunder when the night passes.

0=false, 100=true, 1..99=x%.
§cREQUIRES: /sleep reload
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.duration_mult:
Multiplier that scales the time the sleep animation takes.

§cREQUIRES: /sleep reload
config.seamlesssleep.server_controlled:
§6Server Controlled

§r§o§7Can be tweaked via /sleep or by the host
High-level controls for the server-side world acceleration that runs while the sleep skip is active.
Extra random ticks for crops, vegetation and other eligible nature blocks inside the valid area.
Accelerates furnace-like recipes using the logical sleep rate while preserving fuel fairness.

OFF disables world acceleration.
AUTO uses the MSPT governor.
CUSTOM uses the configured fixed values.

Preset bundle for the acceleration governor and module tuning.
Changing manual values switches the preset to CUSTOM.
Enables extra server-side random ticks while the sleep animation is active.
Enables accelerated furnace, smoker and blast furnace processing during the sleep animation.
How aggressively AUTO shrinks radius and rate when MSPT pressure rises.
Eligible random-tick profile for the extra nature acceleration.

Chunk radius around each active player.
Use 0 to follow the server simulation distance.

Smallest chunk radius AUTO may keep when the server is under pressure.
Use 0 to follow simulation distance.

Share of the logical sleep world rate applied to extra random ticks.
100% means the full logical world acceleration.
Minimum share AUTO may keep for nature acceleration.

Share of the logical sleep world rate applied to furnace-like processing.
100% targets the full logical world acceleration.
Minimum share AUTO may keep for process acceleration.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.created: Config not found. Default created and loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.error: Failed to read config. Defaults loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.synced: All clients synchronized with the server.
command.seamlesssleep.set.sleep_clears_w: Weather Clear Chance is set to %s.
command.seamlesssleep.acceleration.statu: World acceleration status is unavailable right now.
World rate %sx, avg %s MSPT, p95 %s MSPT, governor %s.
Nature -> radius %s/%s, rate %s, extra attempts/section %s, covered chunks %s.
Processes -> radius %s/%s, rate %s, multiplier %sx, covered chunks %s.
command.seamlesssleep.acceleration.rando: Random Tick / Nature acceleration updated to %s.
screen.seamlesssleep.forge_config.notice: Forge does not support custom config menus
screen.seamlesssleep.forge_config.hint: Edit the config file in your config folder for server and client changes.
screen.seamlesssleep.missing_yacl.hint: Install YetAnotherConfigLib v3 to edit configs.
